data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Story DD Coverage
This task is responsible for satisfying the following story done definitions:
- DD1: ticket-platform-matrix.yml fires on every PR (path filter on pull_request trigger removed)
- DD2: Three legs (linux-bash4, macos-bash3, alpine-busybox) appear as PR check contexts
- DD3: Leg names match Ruleset required-check list (coordinated with fc8b-aab0) — .github/required-checks.txt is the coordination artifact

## TDD Requirement
The RED tests from Task e118-e912 (`test_pull_request_trigger_has_no_paths_filter`, `test_strategy_has_continue_on_error`, `test_required_checks_txt_exists_and_contains_leg_names`) must all pass GREEN after this task.

Before implementing, run `bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-platform-matrix-trigger.sh` and confirm the three target tests fail RED. Then implement and confirm they pass GREEN.

## Implementation Steps

### 1. Edit `.github/workflows/ticket-platform-matrix.yml`

**Change A — Remove the `paths:` block from the `pull_request` trigger ONLY.**

Before (lines 13-18):
```yaml
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
    paths:
      - 'plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh'
      - 'tests/scripts/test-ticket-*.sh'
```

After:
```yaml
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
```

Do NOT touch the `push` trigger's paths block — it stays as-is to prevent matrix from running on every main-branch commit.

**Change B — Add `continue-on-error: true` at the strategy level** (not at the job level, not at the step level — at `strategy:`):

Before:
```yaml
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
```

After:
```yaml
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      continue-on-error: true
      matrix:
```

Note: `continue-on-error` belongs on the JOB, not inside `strategy`. GitHub Actions docs: place `continue-on-error: true` as a sibling of `strategy:` at the job level. Correct placement:

```yaml
  ticket-platform-tests:
    name: Ticket tests (${{ matrix.name }})
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    continue-on-error: true
    timeout-minutes: 15
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
```

### 2. Create `.github/required-checks.txt`

Content (one leg name per line, exact names matching the workflow matrix `name:` values):
```
linux-bash4
macos-bash3
alpine-busybox
```

This file is the coordination artifact for `fc8b-aab0` (Ruleset provisioner). The Ruleset provisioner will read this file to populate its required-check list after G8-M1 fixes land.

### 3. Verify

Run `bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-platform-matrix-trigger.sh` — all 4 tests must pass GREEN.

Validate YAML is still parseable:
```bash
python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/ticket-platform-matrix.yml'))"
```

## File Impact
| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| `.github/workflows/ticket-platform-matrix.yml` | Modify — remove paths from pull_request trigger, add continue-on-error at job level |
| `.github/required-checks.txt` | Create — three leg names, one per line |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-platform-matrix-trigger.sh` exits 0 (all 4 tests GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-platform-matrix-trigger.sh
- [ ] `.github/workflows/ticket-platform-matrix.yml` pull_request trigger has no `paths:` key
  Verify: python3 -c "import yaml; doc=yaml.safe_load(open('$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.github/workflows/ticket-platform-matrix.yml')); pr=doc['on']['pull_request']; exit(0 if 'paths' not in pr else 1)"
- [ ] `.github/workflows/ticket-platform-matrix.yml` push trigger still has its original `paths:` filter
  Verify: python3 -c "import yaml; doc=yaml.safe_load(open('$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.github/workflows/ticket-platform-matrix.yml')); push=doc['on']['push']; exit(0 if 'paths' in push else 1)"
- [ ] `.github/workflows/ticket-platform-matrix.yml` job-level `continue-on-error: true` is present
  Verify: python3 -c "import yaml; doc=yaml.safe_load(open('$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.github/workflows/ticket-platform-matrix.yml')); job=doc['jobs']['ticket-platform-tests']; exit(0 if job.get('continue-on-error') == True else 1)"
- [ ] `.github/required-checks.txt` exists and contains all three leg names
  Verify: grep -q 'linux-bash4' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.github/required-checks.txt && grep -q 'macos-bash3' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.github/required-checks.txt && grep -q 'alpine-busybox' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.github/required-checks.txt
- [ ] YAML file is parseable after changes
  Verify: python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.github/workflows/ticket-platform-matrix.yml')); print('OK')"
- [ ] `bash plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
data.title: Remove pull_request path filter and add continue-on-error; create required-checks.txt
